items.title: TRON: Targeted Rule-Verifiable Online Environments for Visual Reasoning RL

items.title: Mitigating Perceptual Judgment Bias in Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge via Perceptual Perturbation and Reward Modeling

items.title: Decoupled Residual Denoising Diffusion Models for Unified and Data Efficient Image-to-Image Translation
